executives.name: Harry Kenyon-Slaney
executives.background: Harry Kenyon-Slaney was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 16 January 2019. He has over 37 years of experience in the mining industry, notably with Rio Tinto.

executives.name: Lee-Anne de Bruin
executives.background: Ms. de Bruin has over 25 years of experience in the global resources sector, including senior executive roles at Resolute Mining, Newmont, and BHP. She is a Chartered Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: Harry Kenyon-Slaney
board_of_directors.background: Harry Kenyon-Slaney was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 16 January 2019. He has over 37 years of experience in the mining industry, notably with Rio Tinto.
